name: Nimesh Patel
bio: Nimesh Patel is an American stand-up comedian and writer from New Jersey. The first Indian American writer on Saturday Night Live, he also wrote for the Academy Awards before focusing on stand-up. He has self-produced multiple specials, including Thank You China and Lucky Lefty.

timeline.ev: Becomes the first Indian American writer on Saturday Night Live
Self-produces and films the special Thank You China
Named to Variety's 10 Comics to Watch
